text:
Once upon a time in the heart of the Enchanted Forest, there was a small village where the air was always fragrant with the scent of blooming flowers and the chirping of birds was like music to everyone's ears. At the edge of this village lived a young girl named Lily, who was as kind-hearted as she was curious.

Lily had a secret passion for the forest, but her parents were worried about her wandering too far from home. One sunny morning, Lily decided to venture deeper into the woods than ever before. As she walked, she stumbled upon an old, moss-covered door hidden behind a curtain of ivy.

Intrigued, she pushed the door open, revealing a beautiful garden filled with glowing flowers and singing birds. In the center stood a magnificent white unicorn, its coat glistening under the sunlight. The unicorn looked at her with wise, golden eyes and spoke, "Hello, dear one. I am Qwen, the Guardian of the Ench
